debug_info.goal:
k : Type u_1
M : Type u_2
ι : Type u_3
inst✝⁴ : Ring k
inst✝³ : AddCommGroup M
inst✝² : Module k M
inst✝¹ : LE ι
M_ : ι → Submodule k M
inst✝ : IsFilterComplete M_
α : Type u_4
⊢ IsFilterComplete fun i => Submodule.pi Set.univ fun x => M_ i

failed_attempts:
{ eq_bot := by simp [Submodule.iInf_pi, IsFilterComplete.eq_bot]; ext; simp
    exists_surjective := fun f hf ↦ by
      choose x hx using fun a ↦ IsFilterComplete.exists_surjective (fun i ↦ f i a) fun i j h ↦ hf i j h a
      exact ⟨x, fun i a ↦ hx a i⟩ }

end IsFilterComplete

constructor
  · ext f; simp only [Submodule.mem_bot, Submodule.mem_iInf, Submodule.mem_pi]
    exact ⟨fun h x => by simpa [IsFilterComplete.eq_bot] using fun i => h i x, fun h _ _ => by simp [h]⟩
  · intro f hf
    choose g hg using fun x => IsFilterComplete.surjective (fun i => f i x) fun i j h =>
      congr_fun (hf i j h) x
    exact ⟨g, fun i => funext fun x => hg x i⟩

constructor
  · intro x hx
    ext a
    apply IsFilterComplete.eq_zero_of_forall_mem
    intro i
    exact Submodule.mem_pi.1 (hx i) a trivial
  · intro f hf
    choose y hy using fun a ↦ IsFilterComplete.exists_of_cauchy (fun i ↦ f i a) fun i j h ↦
      Submodule.mem_pi.1 (hf i j h) a trivial
    exact ⟨y, fun i ↦ Submodule.mem_pi.2 fun a _ ↦ hy a i⟩

have ⟨inj, surj⟩ := IsFilterComplete.bijective M_
  let e i := Submodule.quotientPi Set.univ (fun _ : α ↦ M_ i)
  refine ⟨⟨fun f g h ↦ funext fun a ↦ inj <| funext fun i ↦
    congr_fun (e i <| congr_fun (congr_arg Subtype.val h) i) ⟨a, Set.mem_univ _⟩,
    fun ⟨y, hy⟩ ↦ ?_⟩⟩
  choose f hf using fun a ↦ surj ⟨fun i ↦ e i (y.1 i) ⟨a, Set.mem_univ _⟩, fun i j h ↦ by
    have := hy i j h; dsimp at this ⊢; rw [← this]; rfl⟩
  refine ⟨f, Subtype.ext <| funext fun i ↦ (e i).injective <| funext fun ⟨a, _⟩ ↦ ?_⟩
  exact congr_fun (congr_arg Subtype.val (hf a)) i

constructor
  intro f hf
  simp only [Submodule.mem_pi, Set.mem_univ, forall_true_left] at hf ⊢
  choose x hx using fun a ↦ IsFilterComplete.exact M_ (fun i ↦ f i a) fun i j h ↦ hf i j h a
  refine ⟨fun a ↦ x a, fun i a ↦ (hx a).1 i, fun y hy ↦ funext fun a ↦ ?_⟩
  exact (hx a).2 (y a) fun i ↦ hy i a
